channel.title: Azure Monitor Agent on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Monitor Agent on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Monitor supports native OTLP ingestion using the Azure Monitor Agent
item.description:
Azure Monitor now has public preview support for native OTLP ingestion through the Azure Monitor Agent (AMA). OpenTelemetry-instrumented applications can send telemetry directly to AMA, which exports it to Azure Monitor.

  • Source: Azure Updates
